title: Search | Depop
memory: The previous steps consistently returned 0 results for "iphone 15 pro 256gb" and provided limited data on the "Browse Depop" items. I have confirmed the grid layout and filters but still lack specific titles/descriptions for the first 5 recommended items as they were not fully loaded or visible in the markdown.

extract.query: Document the Depop search results page: 1. Confirm listing display format (grid/list). 2. Describe where prices and titles are located (e.g., price below image). 3. List the first 5 items from the 'Browse Depop' section with their titles/descriptions and prices. 4. List all available filter buttons and sorting options. 5. Note any visible popups or promotional banners like 'Boosted Listings'.
